originalTitle: Ariana Grande - hate that i made you love me (official lyric video)
content: The official lyric video for Ariana Grande’s “hate that i made you love me” Listen to “hate that i made you love me” https://arianagrande.lnk.to/htimylm Shop the ‘petal’ and “hate that i made you love me” collections: https://arianagrande.lnk.to/shop ► Follow Ariana Grande: https://www.arianagrande.com https://instagram.com/arianagrande https://tiktok.com/@arianagrande https://facebook.com/arianagrande ► Subscribe to Ariana Grande: https://arianagrande.lnk.to/subscribe Official “hate that i made you love me” lyrics: i can’t tell you why but something inside is dancing with fire eyes lit like the sky turned tears into diamonds got good at goodbyes just know that i will find my way from you like flowers from a tomb while you decide who you are and i can see right through like shadows on the moon and it’s all bad news yeah i i i hate that i made you love me sorry if i made me your type yeah i i hate that i made you love me cause i barely tried what’s happening now ? you studied my crown and borrowed my body warm, kissed by the sun then cold like the wind a bee stuck in honey know that i will find my way from you i guess it’s kinda cute how you like me where you are but i can see right through just don’t eclipse the moon cause it’s all bad news yeah i i i hate that i made you love me sorry if i made me your type yeah i i hate that i made you love me cause i barely tried i’ve held your projections when you’ve felt so insecure tell me why is it this way why you so hate to see women endure is it really my fault you all gave me your hearts of your own accord ? i don’t really think so i i i hate that i made you love me sorry if i made me your type yeah i i hate that i made you love me cause i barely tried #arianagrande #hatethatimadeyouloveme #petal

chineseContent: Ariana Grande 的“讨厌我让你爱我”的官方歌词视频 聆听“讨厌我让你爱我” https://arianagrande.lnk.to/htimylm 购买“花瓣”和“讨厌我让你爱我”系列：https://arianagrande.lnk.to/shop ► 关注 Ariana Grande：https://www.arianagrande.com https://instagram.com/arianagrande https://tiktok.com/@arianagrande https://facebook.com/arianagrande ► 订阅 Ariana Grande：https://arianagrande.lnk.to/subscribe 官方“讨厌我让你爱我”歌词：我无法告诉你为什么，但内心的某些东西正在舞动，火眼金睛，明亮如天空，泪水化为钻石，善于告别，只知道我会像坟墓里的花朵一样找到我的路，而你决定你是谁，我可以看到就像月亮上的阴影一样，这都是坏消息是的，我我讨厌我让你爱我，对不起，如果我让我成为你的类型，是的，我讨厌我让你爱我，因为我几乎没有尝试过现在发生的事情？你研究我的王冠，借用我的身体，温暖，被太阳亲吻，然后像风一样寒冷，一只被困在蜂蜜中的蜜蜂知道我会从你身边找到我的路，我猜你喜欢我现在的样子有点可爱，但我可以看穿，只是不要让月亮黯然失色，因为这都是坏消息是的，我我讨厌我让你爱我，对不起，如果我让我成为你的类型，是的，我讨厌我让你爱我，因为我几乎没有尝试过，当你感觉如此时，我已经保留了你的预测没有安全感告诉我为什么会这样为什么你们这么讨厌看到女人忍受真的是我的错你们都自愿把你们的心给了我吗？我真的不这么认为，我我讨厌我让你爱我，对不起，如果我让我成为你的类型，是的，我讨厌我让你爱我，因为我几乎没有尝试过#arianagrande #hatethatimadeyouloveme #petal
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 YouTube 热门视频信号，适合用于观察大众注意力、内容叙事、传播主题和跨平台选题机会。
